Abra Dental Group — 4 CT locations acquired by Abra Dental NJ. Rep ownership is PER DEALER per child account. Darby child accounts = Darby rep. Danbury Schein child (Master-CM705315) = NJ Schein rep post-acquisition (Rich Foti was CT Schein rep before). Ryan Mastej at Patterson owns any Patterson child accounts only.

dealerNotes.Schein: NJ Schein rep took over Master-CM705315 (Danbury) post-acquisition. Rich Foti was original CT rep.
dealerNotes.Darby: Darby rep owns Stamford, Norwalk, Derby locations
